calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Change Of Venue
Off Calendar Apr-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marc Seidenfeld, Esq (650-877-8253) for Thomas Joseph Bogdan, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Elizabeth Erhardt, Esq of Utrecht & Lenvin LLP (415-357-0600) for Jane Chavez, Defendant and Moving party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JANE CHAVEZ's Motion For Change Of Venue is GRANTED. Defendant's motion for attorney's fees is argued and taken under submission. The Court orders Prevailing party to prepare an order approved as to form and leave the amount on attorney's fees blank. Judge: Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
